summary: Tested 4 sandbox mode states (SIMULATION, SANDBOX_READY, SANDBOX_CONNECTED, SANDBOX_BLOCKED) for Certification Console. Backend API passes all tests - returns correct modes based on credentials and network availability. Frontend has a bug where sandbox status doesn't properly update when switching suppliers.

ui_bugs.issue: Sandbox status card doesn't refresh correctly when switching suppliers - shows stale data from previous supplier
ui_bugs.details: When clicking from RateHawk (sandbox_blocked) to Paximum (simulation), the API correctly returns simulation mode but the UI shows stale sandbox_blocked data. Race condition in useCallback/useEffect causes multiple API calls with stale selectedSupplier values.

integration_issues.issue: loadSandboxStatus useCallback triggers with stale selectedSupplier value, causing multiple API calls with wrong supplier parameter

action_items: Fix race condition in loadSandboxStatus - consider using useRef for selectedSupplier or adding debounce/cancellation logic
Ensure sandboxStatus state is cleared when supplier changes before new API call completes
Alternative fix: Move sandbox status fetch logic to the supplier button click handler instead of useEffect
critical_code_review_comments: loadSandboxStatus useCallback/useEffect pattern has race condition - stale closure issue when selectedSupplier changes rapidly
Consider using abort controller to cancel pending requests when supplier changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend sandbox-status API works correctly. RateHawk returns mode=sandbox_blocked (has db_config credentials but API blocked by env). Paximum/TBO/WTatil return mode=simulation (no credentials). Frontend bug: when switching suppliers, sandbox status card shows stale data due to race condition in useCallback/useEffect. The API calls are made correctly but multiple calls with stale supplier values overwrite the correct state.

frontend_components.Mode badge in header: PARTIAL - Shows correct mode initially but stale after supplier switch
frontend_components.Sandbox status card: PARTIAL - Doesn't update correctly when supplier changes
frontend_components.SandboxReadinessIndicator: PARTIAL - Blocked badge shows for sandbox_blocked, doesn't update on switch

mode_states_verified.simulation: No credentials configured - Paximum, TBO, WTatil correctly return this
mode_states_verified.sandbox_blocked: Credentials exist but env blocks API - RateHawk correctly returns this with DNS error
mode_states_verified.sandbox_ready: Not tested - requires credentials without network block
mode_states_verified.sandbox_connected: Not tested - requires working API connection

root_cause_analysis.evidence: API call log shows: clicking Paximum triggers 1x paximum call + 2x ratehawk calls (stale)
reproduction_steps: 2. Default supplier is RateHawk - shows SANDBOX BLOCKED correctly
4. Observe: Header badge shows SIMULATION but sandbox status card still shows SANDBOX BLOCKED
5. Check network tab: API call made to paximum returns simulation, but subsequent ratehawk calls overwrite state
root_cause_analysis.suggested_fix: Use abort controller or isMounted check in useEffect, or fetch sandbox status directly in supplier button click handler
